utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with named plans and explicit monthly costs, plus a total health cost. This matches the requirement (physical and mental with costs). Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Provides home/contents insurance with plan name, coverage limit, and monthly cost, plus total property cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance with plan name, description of coverage, and monthly cost, plus total travel cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: Lists enhancement services, but no explicit costs are provided for these services; only mentions a company subsidy without a price for each service. The format requires “any enhancement services with costs,” so this is not fully specified. 5) total_budget: Provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, including contributions, actual premiums, savings, and improvements. Fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three specific policies from the LifeFirst brand: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health Insurance, LifeFirst Standard Mental Health Insurance, LifeFirst Standard Home Content Insurance, and LifeFirst Standard Travel Insurance. In the ground-truth ratings, these correspond to: Primary Health Coverage -> physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); Primary Health Coverage -> mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8); Property Protection -> home_content -> LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 8); Mobility Coverage -> travel_insurance -> LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 7). Mapping each named item accordingly yields the exact ratings.
